titleStmt.title: SII 11.157: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 157. (B.K. No. 88 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE DHVAJASTAṀBHA IN FRONT OF THE NĀRĀYAṆADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged and incomplete inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year [32], Sarvadhāri, Jyēshṭha, amāvāsye, Wednesday, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1108, June 11, Thursday, when there was a solar eclipse; the week day is probably an error. It mentions Mahāpradhāna Sēnādhipati Daṇḍanāyaka Chidda and the temple of Vīranārāyaṇadēva at the town of Muḷgunda.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mira tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vidvajjanēṣṭaphaḷapradāya
ka nasēsavastunāyaka nabhinavakusmasāyakaṁ nijabhujōpārjjitavijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ vairikritāntaṁ saraṇāgatavajraprākāra nēkāṁgavīraṁ ha
racaraṇasmaraṇapariṇitāntaḥkaraṇaṁ sarasvatīkaṇṭhābharaṇaṁ viprakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ samara pracaṇḍa niyōgiyōgandharaṁ kadanakēḷīdhuraṁdharaṁ
dhairyyakuḷācaḷaṁ vidviṣṭajaḷadhibaḍavānaḷaṁ svāmidrōhara śirōvajradaṇḍaṁ koṁḍeyakuḷakāḷadaṇḍa kūḍitappuvaragaṇḍa nuḍidantagaṇḍaṁ śrīmattribhu
vanamallapādapadmārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā pradhāna sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyakaṁ cāvuṇḍamayyaṁgaḷu . Ātana
. varavanitāmanōja budhabāṁdhavakaḷpamahīja dhairyyamandaranagarāja sauryyamṛgarāja camū bhāsurataratēja vipra
sāgarasurasaiḷadiggajasūryyasasāṁkaruḷḷinaṁ . kanda . śrīramaṇīpadakadantira pērura nelase vīraśrīrama
ṇi dēvi peṁpu ciddadaṇḍādhipanaṁ © śrīnidha vivēkanidhi vidyānidhi kulanidhi vīrani nidhi tējōnidhi dayānidhi kīrtti śrīnidhi
yene ciddaṁ budharggaṁ navanidhiyenipa . Antenisi negardda mahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyaka ciddarasana śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama
variṣa 32 neya sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭabahuḷadamāvāseyu saumyavāramu sūryyagrahaṇa paṭṭaṇa mu
ḷgundada nagariya śrīvīranārāyaṇadēvara stānama © svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamānānūna
kiraṇa bhaktajanavārddhivarddhanasudhākiraṇa brahmavidyālatāpravarddhana pravaha catu
rānana bauddhamadēbhapaṁcānana cārvvākabhēkānīkadaṁdasūka syādvādavādīṁdragarvvitāluṁṭaka pravāhaprakṣālita
sāṁkhya naiyāyikadrumasaṇḍakhaṇḍananisitakuṭhāra tiraskrita madanadhanurdaṁḍa vainetēya
raṁjana vipakṣaghanāghanaprabhaṁjana sarvvajanamaṇḍana
kulayasōnistāraka
Digital edition of SII 11.157 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
